examples: Among them the most important are: Tamburlaine, Parts I & II, Dr. Faustus, The Jew of Malta and Edward II.
The central figure, Edward Ii himself, instead of being aggressive and overpowering, as are Tamburlaine and Faustus, is sentimental and weak.
Travel the legendary Silk Road formed by the forays of Genghis Khan, Marco Polo, and Tamburlaine.
